title: Cobble Christmas
description: The perfect mix of vanilla enhancements and cobblemon for the holiday season!
body:
### A personal updated take on vanilla Minecraft and Cobblemon!
___
Made for server use, the modpack brings new adventures and different ways to play, whether you enjoy Minecraft or Cobblemon.

Featuring mods such as [Vanilla Refresh](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vanilla-refresh), [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), [Mythic Upgrades](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-upgrades), and many more!

**Best to experience with others!**
___

_Designed for Fabric 1.21.1._
